import json
import os

# Load JSON
json_path = r'C:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\Stationeers\Stationpedia\Stationpedia.json'
with open(json_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    data = json.load(f)

batch4 = [
    'ThingStructureConsoleBase3Double', 'ThingStructureConsoleBase4', 'ThingStructureConsoleBase4Double',
    'ThingStructureConsoleBase5', 'ThingStructureConsoleBase5Double', 'ThingStructureConsoleBase6',
    'ThingStructureConsoleBase6Double', 'ThingStructureConsoleBaseCorner1', 'ThingStructureConsoleBaseCorner2',
    'ThingStructureConsoleBaseCorner3', 'ThingStructureConsoleBaseCorner4', 'ThingStructureConsoleBaseCorner5',
    'ThingStructureConsoleBaseCorner6', 'ThingStructureConsoleCornerInner1', 'ThingStructureConsoleCornerInner1Center',
    'ThingStructureConsoleCornerInner1Double', 'ThingStructureConsoleCornerInner2', 'ThingStructureConsoleCornerInner2Center',
    'ThingStructureConsoleCornerInner2Double', 'ThingStructureConsoleDual', 'ThingStructureConsoleFlat1',
    'ThingStructureConsoleFlat1Corner', 'ThingStructureConsoleFlat1Corner2', 'ThingStructureConsoleFlat1Corner3',
    'ThingStructureConsoleFlat1Double', 'ThingStructureConsoleFlat2', 'ThingStructureConsoleFlat2Double',
    'ThingStructureConsoleFlat3', 'ThingStructureConsoleFlat3Double', 'ThingStructureConsoleFlat3x2',
    'ThingStructureConsoleFlat3x2Double', 'ThingStructureConsoleFlatCornerInner', 'ThingStructureConsoleFlatCornerInnerDouble',
    'ThingStructureConsoleFlatCornerInnerDoubleCenter', 'ThingStructureConsoleLED1x2', 'ThingStructureConsoleLED1x3',
    'ThingStructureConsoleLED5', 'ThingStructureConsoleMonitor', 'ThingStructureConsoleTerminal',
    'ThingStructureConsoleTerminal2', 'ThingStructureConsoleWallMount1', 'ThingStructureConsoleWallMount2',
    'ThingStructureCornerLocker', 'ThingStructureCrewUmbilical', 'ThingStructureCryoTubeHorizontal',
    'ThingStructureCryoTubeVertical', 'ThingStructureDaylightSensor', 'ThingStructureDeepMiner',
    'ThingStructureDigitalValve', 'ThingStructureDiode', 'ThingStructureDiodeSlide',
    'ThingStructureDrinkingFountain2x1', 'ThingStructureElectrolyzer', 'ThingStructureElectronicsPrinter',
    'ThingStructureElevatorLevelFront', 'ThingStructureElevatorLevelIndustrial', 'ThingStructureElevatorShaft',
    'ThingStructureElevatorShaftIndustrial', 'ThingStructureEmergencyButton', 'ThingStructureEvaporationChamber',
    'ThingStructureExpansionValve'
]

pages = {p['Key']: p for p in data['pages']}

out_path = r'C:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\temp_device_keys.txt'
with open(out_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    for key in batch4:
        if key in pages:
            device = pages[key]
            logic_count = len(device.get('LogicInsert', []))
            title = device.get('Title', '').strip()
            # Clean title
            title = title.replace('<N:EN:', '').replace('>', '')
            f.write(f'{key}|{title}|{logic_count}\\n')

print(f'Written device info to {out_path}')
" > NUL 2>&1; if ($?) { Write-Host "SUCCESS: Device analysis complete"; Get-Content "C:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\temp_device_keys.txt" } else { Write-Host "FAILED" }

<tool-use data-tool-type="generic" data-tool-name="run_in_terminal"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **run_in_terminal**</summary>

**Input:**

- command:

```

$devices = @('ThingH2Combustor','ThingStructureGasGenerator','ThingStructureSmallSatelliteDish','ThingStructureGasUmbilicalMale','ThingStructureHorizontalAutoMiner','ThingStructureAirlock','ThingLogicStepSequencer8','ThingStructureLogicMath','ThingStructureKlaxon','ThingStructureDiodeSlide','ThingStructureWallLightBattery','ThingStructureLightLongWide','ThingStructureSmallDirectHeatExchangeLiquidtoGas','ThingStructurePassthroughHeatExchangerGasToGas','ThingStructureLogicSwitch2','ThingStructurePressurePlateMedium','ThingBattery_Wireless_cell_Big')

$json = Get-Content 'C:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\Stationeers\Stationpedia\Stationpedia.json' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json

$output = @()

foreach($deviceKey in $devices) {
    $entry = $json.pages | Where-Object {$_.Key -eq $deviceKey}
    if($entry) {
        $logics = @{}
        foreach($l in $entry.LogicInsert) {
            if($l.LogicName -match 'LogicType(\w+)') {
                $logicName = $matches[1]
                $logics[$logicName] = @{
                    access = $l.LogicAccessTypes
                }
            }
        }
        $output += @{
            deviceKey = $deviceKey
            title = $entry.Title
            logicCount = $logics.Count
            logics = $logics
        }
        Write-Host "Processed: $deviceKey - $($entry.Title) - $($logics.Count) logic types"
    }
}

$output | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 | Out-File 'C:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\batch4_review_data.json' -Encoding UTF8
Write-Host "`nSaved to batch4_review_data.json"

```

- explanation: `Extract all logic types for batch-4 devices`
- isBackground: `false`

</details></tool-use>
